message:
fix(epoch,h2): barrier TOCTOU and RFC 7540 unknown frame compliance

epoch.rs: Hold participants write lock across both the dedup check and
the atomic arrived counter increment to prevent TOCTOU where the list
and counter could desync if a thread panics between the two operations.

h2/frame.rs: Add Frame::Unknown variant so parse_frame returns Ok for
unrecognized frame types instead of Err, per RFC 7540 §4.1 which
requires endpoints to ignore unknown frame types. The connection codec
already skipped unknown types before calling parse_frame, but the
function itself was non-compliant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
